description: Comfortable, high-performance and pleasing to the eye, this Fontana shoe from vans incoporates contemporary design details into these authentic skater kicks. Styled for the sport and fashion conscious, this pair is as durable as it looks - this pair is a definite entry on our must-have list.UpperSuede, synthetic and mesh uppers Vans fashion cupsoleDouble stitching on the toe capVanslite super-soft molded and contoured EVA sock liner Central lacing systemCustom eyelets and woven labelsPadded tongue and collar for instep comfortMidsoleDie cut EVA midsoleOutsoleSBR rubber outsole with Vans' WaffleGrip patterning Shoe careWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
